question_intent: average points per driver per race for constructors with more than 5 wins in the 2009 season

plan.question_intent: average points per driver per race for constructors with more than 5 wins in the 2009 season
plan.detail_query: SELECT d.forename AS driver_first_name, d.surname AS driver_last_name, r.name AS race_name, AVG(c.points) AS avg_points FROM drivers AS d JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid JOIN races AS r ON r.raceid = r.raceid JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid WHERE r.year = 2009 AND cs.wins > 5 GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
join_clauses: JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year = 2009)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins > 5)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 5)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins > 4)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins > 4)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 5)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
LIMIT 5

SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid

SELECT *
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.avg_points)
FROM (SELECT d.driverid, r.raceid, AVG(r.points) AS avg_points
FROM drivers AS d
JOIN results AS r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
JOIN races AS ra ON r.raceid = ra.raceid
JOIN constructors AS c ON r.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN constructorstandings AS cs ON c.constructorid = cs.constructorid
WHERE (ra.year >= 2009) AND (cs.wins >= 0)
GROUP BY d.driverid, r.raceid) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.points) AS average_points_per_constructor
FROM (SELECT c.name AS constructor_name, cr.points
FROM constructorresults cr
JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructorid = c.constructorid
JOIN races r ON cr.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN circuits ci ON r.circuitid = ci.circuitid
WHERE (ci.country = 'Australia')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average of the average points scored by each driver in each race for races held from 2009 onward?
